---
description: "Use when working with Orval-generated API files. These files must NEVER be edited manually — they are regenerated from OpenAPI specs."
applyTo: ["src/web/src/api/crm/**", "src/web/src/api/scheduling/**"]
---
# Generated API Files — DO NOT EDIT

Files under `src/web/src/api/crm/` and `src/web/src/api/scheduling/` are **auto-generated by Orval** from OpenAPI specs.

- **Never edit these files manually** — changes will be overwritten on next codegen run
- To regenerate: run `npx orval` from `src/web/`
- Configuration: [orval.config.ts](../../src/web/orval.config.ts)
- Custom fetch mutators in `src/web/src/api/mutator/` **can** be edited manually

If an API type or hook is missing, update the OpenAPI spec on the backend and regenerate.
